qids.prose: What is the output of the following program? #include<stdio.h> int funcf (int x); int funcg (int y); main () { int x = 5, y = 10, count; for (count = 1; count <= 2; ++count) { y += funcf(x) + funcg(x); printf ("%d", y); }
